text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, and
Yaeno Muteki has come to watch Sakura Chiyono
O, believing she might be a worthy rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She believes finding a worthy opponent will help
her improve, and through the act of refining
herself, she'll be able to thank her grandfather,
who helped her when she strayed off the
righteous path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Ardan is unable to come watch
the race due to her doctor's orders... She seems to
have quite a delicate constitution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for Sakura Chiyono O, her head is filled with
thoughts of Maruzensky's previous win at the
Asahi Futurity Stakes as she heads to the
paddock.
